name: DOG HYBRID Portgas D Ace
description:
~ Nasty Dog ~

Ace doesn't like to let his puppy-instincts and needs show when out in public, preferring to act more like a normal human than a whiny dog or mangy mut like most dog-hybrids, but when he's alone with her, he just can't help it.

WARNING: idek

EXTRA: 100% inspired by the trend on tiktok. don't judge😔 also I'M BACK Y'ALL😎😎😎 requests are open too, but check my profile for the rules of requesting, aka what i do and do not do.

Bye! Love you! -big sis Lynn
creator: Lilly Beans
